name: Crockpot Curry
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Beef round steak or lean stewing beef, cut into 1-1/2-inch cubes
2 Apples, peeled, cored and finely chopped
2 Apples, unpeeled, cored and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour and curry powder in a shallow dish.
2. Coat the beef cubes with the flour mixture.
3. Arrange the meat in the crockpot.
4. Add minced garlic, raisins, chopped apples, onion, salt, and pepper to the pot.
5. Pour in the beef broth and stir to combine.
6. Cover and cook on LOW setting for 8 to 10 hours or until the meat is tender.
7. Before serving, stir in additional curry powder (up to 1 tablespoon) and chopped apples if desired.
8. Serve the curry over hot rice. Makes about 6 to 8 servings (2-1/2 quarts).
